title: . Assistance by the Institute of Labor and Manpower Studies. The Institute of Labor and
content:
. Assistance by the Institute of Labor and Manpower Studies. The Institute of Labor and 
Manpower Studies shall render technical and other forms of assistance to labor organizations and employer 
organizations in the field of labor education, especially pertaining to collective bargaining, arbitration, labor 
standards and the Labor Code of the Philippines in general. 
Chapter III 
FOREIGN ACTIVITIES
